 1793            var search = new Search().Adjacent("Description", Direction.Below);
 1794            bool matches = search.Matches(input);
 1795            Assert.IsTrue(matches, "Should find input below label");
 1796        }
 1797
 1798        [UnityTest]
 1799        public IEnumerator Adjacent_Above_FindsInputAboveLabel()
 1800        {
 1801            var input = CreateInputField("OptionToggle", new Vector2(0, 50));
 1802            var label = CreateLabel("Clear Selection", new Vector2(0, -50));
 1803            yield return null;
 1804            var search = new Search().Adjacent("Clear Selection", Direction.Above);
 1805            bool matches = search.Matches(input);
 1806            Assert.IsTrue(matches, "Should find input above label");
 1807        }
 1808
 1809        [UnityTest]
 1810        public IEnumerator Adjacent_NoMatchingLabel_ReturnsFalse()
 1811        {
 1812            var label = CreateLabel("Other Label:", new Vector2(-100, 0));
 1813            var input = CreateInputField("TestInput", new Vector2(100, 0));
 1814            yield return null;
 1815            var search = new Search().Adjacent("NonExistent:");
 1816            bool matches = search.Matches(input);
 1817            Assert.IsFalse(matches, "Should not match when label text doesn't exist");
 1818        }
 1819
 1820        [UnityTest]
 1821        public IEnumerator Adjacent_WildcardPattern_Matches()
 1822        {
 1823            var label = CreateLabel("Username:", new Vector2(-100, 0));
 1824            var input = CreateInputField("UsernameInput", new Vector2(100, 0));
 1825            yield return null;
 1826            var search = new Search().Adjacent("User*");
 1827            bool matches = search.Matches(input);
 1828            Assert.IsTrue(matches, "Should match with wildcard pattern");
 1829        }
 1830
 1831        #endregion
 1832
 1833        #region Near Tests
 1834
 1835        [UnityTest]
 1836        public IEnumerator Near_MatchesAllInDirection_OrdersByDistance()
 1837        {
 1838            return UniTask.ToCoroutine(async () =>
 1839            {
 1840                // Label in center, buttons at different distances
 1841                var label = CreateLabel("Center Flag", new Vector2(0, 0));
 1842                var closeButton = CreateButton("TextureButton", new Vector2(50, -30)); // Closest
 1843                var farButton = CreateButton("OtherButton", new Vector2(200, 0)); // Further away
 1844                await UniTask.Yield();
 1845
 1846                // Near() without direction matches ALL elements
 1847                var search = new Search().Near("Center Flag");
 1848                Assert.IsTrue(search.Matches(closeButton), "Close button should match");
 1849                Assert.IsTrue(search.Matches(farButton), "Far button should also match (no direction filter)");
 1850
 1851                // Find() returns closest due to ordering
 1852                var testGO = new GameObject("TestBehaviour");
 1853                _createdObjects.Add(testGO);
 1854                var test = testGO.AddComponent<TestFindHelper>();
 1855                var result = await test.TestFind<Button>(new Search().Near("Center Flag"));
 1856                Assert.AreEqual("TextureButton", result.name, "Find should return closest button");
 1857            });
 1858        }
 1859
 1860        [UnityTest]
 1861        public IEnumerator Near_WithDirectionFilter_OnlyMatchesInDirection()
 1862        {
 1863            var label = CreateLabel("Center Flag", new Vector2(0, 0));
 1864            var belowButton = CreateButton("BelowButton", new Vector2(0, -80)); // Below
 1865            var aboveButton = CreateButton("AboveButton", new Vector2(0, 80)); // Above
 1866            yield return null;
 1867
 1868            // Direction filtering works - elements outside direction don't match
 1869            var searchBelow = new Search().Near("Center Flag", Direction.Below);
 1870            Assert.IsTrue(searchBelow.Matches(belowButton), "Button below should match when filtering Below");
 1871            Assert.IsFalse(searchBelow.Matches(aboveButton), "Button above should NOT match when filtering Below");
 1872
 1873            var searchAbove = new Search().Near("Center Flag", Direction.Above);
 1874            Assert.IsTrue(searchAbove.Matches(aboveButton), "Button above should match when filtering Above");
 1875            Assert.IsFalse(searchAbove.Matches(belowButton), "Button below should NOT match when filtering Above");
 1876        }
 1877
 1878        [UnityTest]
 1879        public IEnumerator Near_WithDirectionFilter_AllInDirectionMatch()
 1880        {
 1881            return UniTask.ToCoroutine(async () =>
 1882            {
 1883                var label = CreateLabel("Center Flag", new Vector2(0, 50));
 1884                var closeBelow = CreateButton("CloseBelow", new Vector2(0, -30)); // Closer below
 1885                var farBelow = CreateButton("FarBelow", new Vector2(0, -150)); // Further below
 1886                await UniTask.Yield();
 1887
 1888                // Both elements below match - Near() matches all in direction
 1889                var search = new Search().Near("Center Flag", Direction.Below);
 1890                Assert.IsTrue(search.Matches(closeBelow), "Closer button below should match");
 1891                Assert.IsTrue(search.Matches(farBelow), "Farther button below should also match");
 1892
 1893                // Find() returns closest
 1894                var testGO = new GameObject("TestBehaviour");
 1895                _createdObjects.Add(testGO);
 1896                var test = testGO.AddComponent<TestFindHelper>();
 1897                var result = await test.TestFind<Button>(new Search().Near("Center Flag", Direction.Below));
 1898                Assert.AreEqual("CloseBelow", result.name, "Find should return closest button");
 1899            });
 1900        }
 1901
 1902        [UnityTest]
 1903        public IEnumerator Near_DiagonalElement_AllMatch_OrderedByDistance()
 1904        {
 1905            return UniTask.ToCoroutine(async () =>
 1906            {
 1907                // Label and buttons - Near() without direction matches all
 1908                var label = CreateLabel("Texture", new Vector2(0, 50));
 1909                var diagonalClose = CreateButton("DiagonalButton", new Vector2(30, -20)); // Diagonal but closest
 1910                var straightFar = CreateButton("StraightButton", new Vector2(0, -150)); // Straight down but far
 1911                await UniTask.Yield();
 1912
 1913                var search = new Search().Near("Texture");
 1914                Assert.IsTrue(search.Matches(diagonalClose), "Diagonal button should match");
 1915                Assert.IsTrue(search.Matches(straightFar), "Straight button should also match");
 1916
 1917                // Find() returns closest
 1918                var testGO = new GameObject("TestBehaviour");
 1919                _createdObjects.Add(testGO);
 1920                var test = testGO.AddComponent<TestFindHelper>();
 1921                var result = await test.TestFind<Button>(new Search().Near("Texture"));
 1922                Assert.AreEqual("DiagonalButton", result.name, "Find should return closest (diagonal) button");
 1923            });
 1924        }
 1925
 1926        [UnityTest]
 1927        public IEnumerator Near_ChainedWithName_FiltersResults()
 1928        {
 1929            var label = CreateLabel("Center Flag", new Vector2(0, 50));
 1930            var textureButton = CreateButton("TextureButton", new Vector2(0, -30));
 1931            var maskButton = CreateButton("MaskButton", new Vector2(0, -80));
 1932            yield return null;
 1933
 1934            // Name filter excludes MaskButton, Near matches both (in direction)
 1935            var search = new Search().Near("Center Flag", Direction.Below).Name("*Texture*");
 1936            Assert.IsTrue(search.Matches(textureButton), "TextureButton should match Near+Name filter");
 1937            Assert.IsFalse(search.Matches(maskButton), "MaskButton should not match Name filter (different name)");
 1938        }
 1939
 1940        [UnityTest]
 1941        public IEnumerator Near_NonExistentLabel_ReturnsFalse()
 1942        {
 1943            var button = CreateButton("SomeButton", new Vector2(0, 0));
 1944            yield return null;
 1945
 1946            var search = new Search().Near("NonExistentLabel");
 1947            Assert.IsFalse(search.Matches(button), "Should not match when label doesn't exist");
 1948        }
 1949
 1950        [UnityTest]
 1951        public IEnumerator Near_WildcardPattern_Matches()
 1952        {
 1953            var label = CreateLabel("Center Flag", new Vector2(0, 50));
 1954            var button = CreateButton("NearbyButton", new Vector2(0, -30));
 1955            yield return null;
 1956
 1957            var search = new Search().Near("Center*");
 1958            Assert.IsTrue(search.Matches(button), "Should match with wildcard pattern");
 1959        }
 1960
 1961        [UnityTest]
 1962        public IEnumerator Near_LeftDirection_FindsClosestToLeft()
 1963        {
 1964            var label = CreateLabel("Right Label", new Vector2(100, 0));
 1965            var leftButton = CreateButton("LeftButton", new Vector2(-50, 0)); // To the left
 1966            var rightButton = CreateButton("RightButton", new Vector2(200, 0)); // To the right
 1967            yield return null;
 1968
 1969            var search = new Search().Near("Right Label", Direction.Left);
 1970            Assert.IsTrue(search.Matches(leftButton), "Button to the left should match");
 1971            Assert.IsFalse(search.Matches(rightButton), "Button to the right should not match");
 1972        }
 1973
 1974        [UnityTest]
 1975        public IEnumerator Near_RightDirection_FindsClosestToRight()
 1976        {
 1977            var label = CreateLabel("Left Label", new Vector2(-100, 0));
 1978            var leftButton = CreateButton("LeftButton", new Vector2(-200, 0)); // To the left
 1979            var rightButton = CreateButton("RightButton", new Vector2(50, 0)); // To the right
 1980            yield return null;
 1981
 1982            var search = new Search().Near("Left Label", Direction.Right);
 1983            Assert.IsFalse(search.Matches(leftButton), "Button to the left should not match");
 1984            Assert.IsTrue(search.Matches(rightButton), "Button to the right should match");
 1985        }
 1986
 1987        [UnityTest]
 1988        public IEnumerator Near_VsAdjacent_NearIsMoreLenient()
 1989        {
 1990            // ByAdjacent requires strict row/column alignment
 1991            // Near uses pure distance, so diagonal elements can match
 1992            var label = CreateLabel("Test Label", new Vector2(0, 0));
 1993            // Diagonal position - not strictly "right" or "below" but close
 1994            var diagonalButton = CreateButton("DiagonalButton", new Vector2(80, -60));
 1995            yield return null;
 1996
 1997            // Adjacent.Right requires same row (within tolerance) - should fail for diagonal
 1998            var adjacentSearch = new Search().Adjacent("Test Label", Direction.Right);
 1999
 2000            // Near without direction should find it as closest
 2001            var nearSearch = new Search().Near("Test Label");
 2002            Assert.IsTrue(nearSearch.Matches(diagonalButton), "Near should find diagonal element as closest");
 2003        }
 2004
 2005        /// <summary>
 2006        /// Tests Near() with duplicate elements - simulates Garage scenario where
 2007        /// "Center Flag" and "Right Flag" sections both have "Texture" and "Mask" controls.
 2008        /// Near() matches all elements in the specified direction, ordered by distance.
 2009        /// The closest element is returned first by Find().
 2010        /// </summary>
 2011        [UnityTest]
 2012        public IEnumerator Near_DuplicateElements_CenterFlag_NearFirst()
 2013        {
 2014            return UniTask.ToCoroutine(async () =>
 2015            {
 2016                // Create two sections with identical child structure
 2017                var centerSection = CreatePanel("CenterFlagSection", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(-150, 0), new Vector
 2018                CreateLabelInParent("Center Flag", centerSection.transform, new Vector2(0, 50));
 2019                var centerMaskBtn = CreateButton("CenterFlagMaskBtn", "Mask", centerSection.transform, new Vector2(0, -2
 2020
 2021                var rightSection = CreatePanel("RightFlagSection", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(150, 0), new Vector2(2
 2022                CreateLabelInParent("Right Flag", rightSection.transform, new Vector2(0, 50));
 2023                var rightMaskBtn = CreateButton("RightFlagMaskBtn", "Mask", rightSection.transform, new Vector2(0, -20))
 2024
 2025                await UniTask.Yield();
 2026
 2027                // Near matches all elements below, ordered by distance
 2028                var search = new Search().Near("Center Flag", Direction.Below).Text("Mask");
 2029
 2030                // Both buttons are below "Center Flag" so both match
 2031                Assert.IsTrue(search.Matches(centerMaskBtn.gameObject), "centerMaskBtn should match (closest)");
 2032                Assert.IsTrue(search.Matches(rightMaskBtn.gameObject), "rightMaskBtn should match (farther but still bel
 2033
 2034                // Find returns closest first - centerMaskBtn is closest to "Center Flag"
 2035                var testGO = new GameObject("TestBehaviour");
 2036                _createdObjects.Add(testGO);
 2037                var test = testGO.AddComponent<TestFindAllHelper>();
 2038                var results = await test.TestFindAll<Button>(search);
 2039                Assert.AreEqual(2, results.Count, "Should find 2 Mask buttons");
 2040                Assert.AreEqual("CenterFlagMaskBtn", results[0].name, "First result should be centerMaskBtn (closest)");
 2041                Assert.AreEqual("RightFlagMaskBtn", results[1].name, "Second result should be rightMaskBtn (farther)");
 2042            });
 2043        }
 2044
 2045        [UnityTest]
 2046        public IEnumerator Near_DuplicateElements_CenterFlag_TextFirst()
 2047        {
 2048            return UniTask.ToCoroutine(async () =>
 2049            {
 2050                // Create two sections with identical child structure
 2051                var centerSection = CreatePanel("CenterFlagSection", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(-150, 0), new Vector
 2052                CreateLabelInParent("Center Flag", centerSection.transform, new Vector2(0, 50));
 2053                var centerMaskBtn = CreateButton("CenterFlagMaskBtn", "Mask", centerSection.transform, new Vector2(0, -2
 2054
 2055                var rightSection = CreatePanel("RightFlagSection", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(150, 0), new Vector2(2
 2056                CreateLabelInParent("Right Flag", rightSection.transform, new Vector2(0, 50));
 2057                var rightMaskBtn = CreateButton("RightFlagMaskBtn", "Mask", rightSection.transform, new Vector2(0, -20))
 2058
 2059                await UniTask.Yield();
 2060
 2061                // Text first, then Near - same result since Near sets ordering
 2062                var search = new Search().Text("Mask").Near("Center Flag", Direction.Below);
 2063
 2064                // Both buttons are below "Center Flag" so both match
 2065                Assert.IsTrue(search.Matches(centerMaskBtn.gameObject), "centerMaskBtn should match (closest)");
 2066                Assert.IsTrue(search.Matches(rightMaskBtn.gameObject), "rightMaskBtn should match (farther but still bel
 2067
 2068                // Find returns closest first
 2069                var testGO = new GameObject("TestBehaviour");
 2070                _createdObjects.Add(testGO);
 2071                var test = testGO.AddComponent<TestFindAllHelper>();
 2072                var results = await test.TestFindAll<Button>(search);
 2073                Assert.AreEqual(2, results.Count, "Should find 2 Mask buttons");
 2074                Assert.AreEqual("CenterFlagMaskBtn", results[0].name, "First result should be centerMaskBtn (closest)");
 2075            });
 2076        }
 2077
 2078        [UnityTest]
 2079        public IEnumerator Near_DuplicateElements_RightFlag_NearFirst()
 2080        {
 2081            return UniTask.ToCoroutine(async () =>
 2082            {
 2083                // Create two sections with identical child structure
 2084                var centerSection = CreatePanel("CenterFlagSection", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(-150, 0), new Vector
 2085                CreateLabelInParent("Center Flag", centerSection.transform, new Vector2(0, 50));
 2086                var centerMaskBtn = CreateButton("CenterFlagMaskBtn", "Mask", centerSection.transform, new Vector2(0, -2
 2087
 2088                var rightSection = CreatePanel("RightFlagSection", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(150, 0), new Vector2(2
 2089                CreateLabelInParent("Right Flag", rightSection.transform, new Vector2(0, 50));
 2090                var rightMaskBtn = CreateButton("RightFlagMaskBtn", "Mask", rightSection.transform, new Vector2(0, -20))
 2091
 2092                await UniTask.Yield();
 2093
 2094                // Near matches all elements below "Right Flag", ordered by distance
 2095                var search = new Search().Near("Right Flag", Direction.Below).Text("Mask");
 2096
 2097                // Both buttons are below "Right Flag" so both match
 2098                Assert.IsTrue(search.Matches(rightMaskBtn.gameObject), "rightMaskBtn should match (closest)");
 2099                Assert.IsTrue(search.Matches(centerMaskBtn.gameObject), "centerMaskBtn should match (farther but still b
 2100
 2101                // Find returns closest first - rightMaskBtn is closest to "Right Flag"
 2102                var testGO = new GameObject("TestBehaviour");
 2103                _createdObjects.Add(testGO);
 2104                var test = testGO.AddComponent<TestFindAllHelper>();
 2105                var results = await test.TestFindAll<Button>(search);
 2106                Assert.AreEqual(2, results.Count, "Should find 2 Mask buttons");
 2107                Assert.AreEqual("RightFlagMaskBtn", results[0].name, "First result should be rightMaskBtn (closest)");
 2108                Assert.AreEqual("CenterFlagMaskBtn", results[1].name, "Second result should be centerMaskBtn (farther)")
 2109            });
 2110        }
 2111
 2112        [UnityTest]
 2113        public IEnumerator Near_DuplicateElements_RightFlag_TextFirst()
 2114        {
 2115            return UniTask.ToCoroutine(async () =>
 2116            {
 2117                // Create two sections with identical child structure
 2118                var centerSection = CreatePanel("CenterFlagSection", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(-150, 0), new Vector
 2119                CreateLabelInParent("Center Flag", centerSection.transform, new Vector2(0, 50));

 2124                var rightMaskBtn = CreateButton("RightFlagMaskBtn", "Mask", rightSection.transform, new Vector2(0, -20))
 2125
 2126                await UniTask.Yield();
 2127
 2128                // Text first, then Near - same result since Near sets ordering
 2129                var search = new Search().Text("Mask").Near("Right Flag", Direction.Below);
 2130
 2131                // Both buttons are below "Right Flag" so both match
 2132                Assert.IsTrue(search.Matches(rightMaskBtn.gameObject), "rightMaskBtn should match (closest)");
 2133                Assert.IsTrue(search.Matches(centerMaskBtn.gameObject), "centerMaskBtn should match (farther but still b
 2134
 2135                // Find returns closest first
 2136                var testGO = new GameObject("TestBehaviour");

 2138                var test = testGO.AddComponent<TestFindAllHelper>();

 2141                Assert.AreEqual("RightFlagMaskBtn", results[0].name, "First result should be rightMaskBtn (closest)");
 2142            });

 2144
 2145        [UnityTest]
 2146        public IEnumerator Adjacent_DuplicateElements_CenterFlag_AdjacentFirst()
 2147        {
 2148            // Create two sections with identical child structure
 2149            var centerSection = CreatePanel("CenterFlagSection", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(-150, 0), new Vector2(20
 2150            CreateLabelInParent("Center Flag", centerSection.transform, new Vector2(0, 50));
 2151            var centerTextureBtn = CreateButton("CenterFlagTextureBtn", "Texture", centerSection.transform, new Vector2(
 2152
 2153            var rightSection = CreatePanel("RightFlagSection", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(150, 0), new Vector2(200, 
 2154            CreateLabelInParent("Right Flag", rightSection.transform, new Vector2(0, 50));
 2155            var rightTextureBtn = CreateButton("RightFlagTextureBtn", "Texture", rightSection.transform, new Vector2(0, 
 2156
 2157            yield return null;
 2158
 2159            // Test: Adjacent first, then Text - should find Center Flag's Texture
 2160            var search = new Search().Adjacent("Center Flag", Direction.Below).Text("Texture");
 2161            Assert.IsTrue(search.Matches(centerTextureBtn.gameObject), "Adjacent.Text should find CenterFlagTextureBtn")
 2162            Assert.IsFalse(search.Matches(rightTextureBtn.gameObject), "Adjacent.Text should NOT match RightFlagTextureB
 2163        }
 2164
 2165        [UnityTest]
 2166        public IEnumerator Adjacent_DuplicateElements_CenterFlag_TextFirst()
 2167        {
 2168            // Create two sections with identical child structure
 2169            var centerSection = CreatePanel("CenterFlagSection", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(-150, 0), new Vector2(20
 2170            CreateLabelInParent("Center Flag", centerSection.transform, new Vector2(0, 50));
 2171            var centerTextureBtn = CreateButton("CenterFlagTextureBtn", "Texture", centerSection.transform, new Vector2(
 2172
 2173            var rightSection = CreatePanel("RightFlagSection", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(150, 0), new Vector2(200, 
 2174            CreateLabelInParent("Right Flag", rightSection.transform, new Vector2(0, 50));
 2175            var rightTextureBtn = CreateButton("RightFlagTextureBtn", "Texture", rightSection.transform, new Vector2(0, 
 2176
 2177            yield return null;
 2178
 2179            // Test: Text first, then Adjacent - should find Center Flag's Texture
 2180            var search = new Search().Text("Texture").Adjacent("Center Flag", Direction.Below);
 2181            Assert.IsTrue(search.Matches(centerTextureBtn.gameObject), "Text.Adjacent should find CenterFlagTextureBtn")
 2182            Assert.IsFalse(search.Matches(rightTextureBtn.gameObject), "Text.Adjacent should NOT match RightFlagTextureB
 2183        }
 2184
 2185        /// <summary>
 2186        /// Tests Near() with vertically stacked sections like the Garage UI.
 2187        /// Center Flag section is above Right Flag section, each with identical child labels.
 2188        /// </summary>
 2189        [UnityTest]
 2190        public IEnumerator Near_VerticalSections_HeaderAboveContent()
 2191        {
 2192            // Center Flag section at TOP (y=150)
 2193            var centerSection = CreatePanel("CenterFlagSection", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(0, 150), new Vector2(250
 2194            var centerLabel = CreateLabelInParent("Center Flag", centerSection.transform, new Vector2(0, 80));  // Heade
 2195            var centerTexture = CreateButton("CenterTexture", "Texture", centerSection.transform, new Vector2(0, 40));
 2196            var centerMask = CreateButton("CenterMask", "Mask", centerSection.transform, new Vector2(0, 0));
 2197            var centerNone = CreateButton("CenterNone", "None", centerSection.transform, new Vector2(0, -40));
 2198
 2199            // Right Flag section BELOW (y=-100)
 2200            var rightSection = CreatePanel("RightFlagSection", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(0, -100), new Vector2(250,
 2201            var rightLabel = CreateLabelInParent("Right Flag", rightSection.transform, new Vector2(0, 80));  // Header a
 2202            var rightTexture = CreateButton("RightTexture", "Texture", rightSection.transform, new Vector2(0, 40));
 2203            var rightMask = CreateButton("RightMask", "Mask", rightSection.transform, new Vector2(0, 0));
 2204            var rightNone = CreateButton("RightNone", "None", rightSection.transform, new Vector2(0, -40));
 2205
 2206            yield return null;
 2207            Canvas.ForceUpdateCanvases();
 2208
 2209            // Debug: Log world positions
 2210            Vector3[] corners = new Vector3[4];
 2211
 2212            rightLabel.GetComponent<RectTransform>().GetWorldCorners(corners);
 2213            var rightLabelY = (corners[0].y + corners[2].y) / 2;
 2214            Debug.Log($"[Near Test] Right Flag label world Y: {rightLabelY}");
 2215
 2216            rightTexture.GetComponent<RectTransform>().GetWorldCorners(corners);
 2217            var rightTextureY = (corners[0].y + corners[2].y) / 2;
 2218            Debug.Log($"[Near Test] rightTexture world Y: {rightTextureY}, distance to label: {Mathf.Abs(rightTextureY -
 2219
 2220            rightMask.GetComponent<RectTransform>().GetWorldCorners(corners);
 2221            var rightMaskY = (corners[0].y + corners[2].y) / 2;
 2222            Debug.Log($"[Near Test] rightMask world Y: {rightMaskY}, distance to label: {Mathf.Abs(rightMaskY - rightLab
 2223
 2224            // Test: Near("Right Flag", Below) alone - which elements match?
 2225            var searchNearRightFlag = new Search().Near("Right Flag", Direction.Below);
 2226            Debug.Log($"[Near Test] rightTexture matches Near('Right Flag', Below): {searchNearRightFlag.Matches(rightTe
 2227            Debug.Log($"[Near Test] rightMask matches Near('Right Flag', Below): {searchNearRightFlag.Matches(rightMask.
 2228            Debug.Log($"[Near Test] rightNone matches Near('Right Flag', Below): {searchNearRightFlag.Matches(rightNone.
 2229
 2230            // Near() matches ALL elements in the direction, but orders by distance
 2231            // Both Textures are below "Center Flag" (since rightTexture is also below Center Flag at y=230)
 2232            var searchCenterTexture = new Search().Text("Texture").Near("Center Flag", Direction.Below);
 2233            Assert.IsTrue(searchCenterTexture.Matches(centerTexture.gameObject), "Center Texture should match (below Cen
 2234            // rightTexture is also below Center Flag, so it matches too
 2235            Assert.IsTrue(searchCenterTexture.Matches(rightTexture.gameObject), "Right Texture also matches (below Cente
 2236
 2237            // Near("Right Flag", Below) - both Masks are below Right Flag
 2238            var searchRightMask = new Search().Text("Mask").Near("Right Flag", Direction.Below);
 2239            Assert.IsTrue(searchRightMask.Matches(rightMask.gameObject), "Right Mask should match");
 2240            // centerMask is ABOVE Right Flag (y=150 vs y=-20), so it should NOT match
 2241            Assert.IsFalse(searchRightMask.Matches(centerMask.gameObject), "Center Mask should NOT match (above Right Fl
 2242
 2243            // Near first, then Text - Right Flag's None is below Right Flag
 2244            var searchNearFirst = new Search().Near("Right Flag", Direction.Below).Text("None");
 2245            Assert.IsTrue(searchNearFirst.Matches(rightNone.gameObject), "Right None should match (below Right Flag)");
 2246            // centerNone is ABOVE Right Flag, so it should NOT match
 2247            Assert.IsFalse(searchNearFirst.Matches(centerNone.gameObject), "Center None should NOT match (above Right Fl
 2248        }
 2249
 2250        /// <summary>
 2251        /// Tests Near() with three vertically stacked sections - Near() matches all in direction,
 2252        /// but Find() returns closest first due to ordering.
 2253        /// </summary>
 2254        [UnityTest]
 2255        public IEnumerator Near_ThreeVerticalSections_OrdersByDistance()
 2256        {
 2257            return UniTask.ToCoroutine(async () =>
 2258            {
 2259                // Top section (y=200)
 2260                var topSection = CreatePanel("TopSection", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(0, 200), new Vector2(200, 100)
 2261                CreateLabelInParent("Top Header", topSection.transform, new Vector2(0, 30));
 2262                var topBtn = CreateButton("TopBtn", "Action", topSection.transform, new Vector2(0, -20));
 2263
 2264                // Middle section (y=0)
 2265                var midSection = CreatePanel("MiddleSection", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(0, 0), new Vector2(200, 100
 2266                CreateLabelInParent("Middle Header", midSection.transform, new Vector2(0, 30));
 2267                var midBtn = CreateButton("MiddleBtn", "Action", midSection.transform, new Vector2(0, -20));
 2268
 2269                // Bottom section (y=-200)
 2270                var bottomSection = CreatePanel("BottomSection", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(0, -200), new Vector2(20
 2271                CreateLabelInParent("Bottom Header", bottomSection.transform, new Vector2(0, 30));
 2272                var bottomBtn = CreateButton("BottomBtn", "Action", bottomSection.transform, new Vector2(0, -20));
 2273
 2274                await UniTask.Yield();
 2275                Canvas.ForceUpdateCanvases();
 2276
 2277                var testGO = new GameObject("TestBehaviour");
 2278                _createdObjects.Add(testGO);
 2279                var test = testGO.AddComponent<TestFindHelper>();
 2280
 2281                // Find() with Near() returns closest element first
 2282                var topResult = await test.TestFind<Button>(new Search().Text("Action").Near("Top Header", Direction.Bel
 2283                Assert.AreEqual("TopBtn", topResult.name, "Should find Top section's Action (closest to Top Header)");
 2284
 2285                var midResult = await test.TestFind<Button>(new Search().Text("Action").Near("Middle Header", Direction.
 2286                Assert.AreEqual("MiddleBtn", midResult.name, "Should find Middle section's Action (closest to Middle Hea
 2287
 2288                var bottomResult = await test.TestFind<Button>(new Search().Text("Action").Near("Bottom Header", Directi
 2289                Assert.AreEqual("BottomBtn", bottomResult.name, "Should find Bottom section's Action (closest to Bottom 
 2290
 2291                // Verify direction filtering works - topBtn is ABOVE Middle Header, so shouldn't match
 2292                var searchMid = new Search().Text("Action").Near("Middle Header", Direction.Below);
 2293                Assert.IsFalse(searchMid.Matches(topBtn.gameObject), "Top button is above Middle Header");
 2294            });
 2295        }
 2296
 2297        /// <summary>
 2298        /// Tests Near() with form-style layout - label on left, control on right in each row.
 2299        /// Near() matches all elements in direction, Find() returns closest.
 2300        /// </summary>
 2301        [UnityTest]
 2302        public IEnumerator Near_FormLayout_LabelLeftControlRight()
 2303        {
 2304            return UniTask.ToCoroutine(async () =>
 2305            {
 2306                // Row 1: Username label -> input field
 2307                CreateLabelInParent("Username", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(-100, 50));
 2308                var usernameInput = CreateButton("UsernameInput", "input1", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(50, 50));
 2309
 2310                // Row 2: Password label -> input field
 2311                CreateLabelInParent("Password", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(-100, -50));
 2312                var passwordInput = CreateButton("PasswordInput", "input2", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(50, -50));
 2313
 2314                await UniTask.Yield();
 2315                Canvas.ForceUpdateCanvases();
 2316
 2317                var testGO = new GameObject("TestBehaviour");
 2318                _createdObjects.Add(testGO);
 2319                var test = testGO.AddComponent<TestFindHelper>();
 2320
 2321                // Find() returns closest input to the right of each label
 2322                var usernameResult = await test.TestFind<Button>(new Search().Near("Username", Direction.Right));
 2323                Assert.AreEqual("UsernameInput", usernameResult.name, "Should find Username's input (closest to Username
 2324
 2325                var passwordResult = await test.TestFind<Button>(new Search().Near("Password", Direction.Right));
 2326                Assert.AreEqual("PasswordInput", passwordResult.name, "Should find Password's input (closest to Password
 2327
 2328                // Verify direction filtering - passwordInput is NOT to the right of Username (it's below)
 2329                // Both inputs are at x=50, both labels at x=-100
 2330                // So both inputs ARE to the right of BOTH labels
 2331                var searchUsername = new Search().Near("Username", Direction.Right);
 2332                Assert.IsTrue(searchUsername.Matches(usernameInput.gameObject), "Username input is right of Username lab
 2333                Assert.IsTrue(searchUsername.Matches(passwordInput.gameObject), "Password input is also right of Usernam
 2334            });
 2335        }
 2336
 2337        #endregion
 2338
 2339        #region ScrollTo Tests
 2340
 2341        [UnityTest]
 2342        public IEnumerator Diagnostic_ScrollTo_Visibility()
 2343        {
 2344            return UniTask.ToCoroutine(async () =>
 2345            {
 2346                var scrollView = CreateScrollView("DiagScrollView", new Vector2(0, 0), new Vector2(300, 200));
 2347                var scrollRect = scrollView.GetComponentInChildren<ScrollRect>();
 2348                var viewport = scrollRect.viewport;
 2349                var content = scrollRect.content;
 2350
 2351                var visibleBtn = CreateScrollButton("DiagVisibleItem", "Visible", content.transform);
 2352                for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++)
 2353                {
 2354                    CreateScrollButton($"DiagHiddenItem{i}", $"Hidden {i}", content.transform);
 2355                }
 2356
 2357                await UniTask.Yield();
 2358                Canvas.ForceUpdateCanvases();
 2359                scrollRect.verticalNormalizedPosition = 1f; // Start at top
 2360                await UniTask.Yield();
 2361
 2362                // Log viewport info
 2363                Vector3[] viewportCorners = new Vector3[4];
 2364                viewport.GetWorldCorners(viewportCorners);
 2365                Debug.Log($"[DIAGNOSTIC] Viewport corners: [{viewportCorners[0]}, {viewportCorners[1]}, {viewportCorners
 2366                Debug.Log($"[DIAGNOSTIC] Viewport min: {viewportCorners[0]}, max: {viewportCorners[2]}");
 2367                Debug.Log($"[DIAGNOSTIC] Content height: {content.rect.height}");
 2368
 2369                // Log first few item positions
 2370                var firstBtn = visibleBtn.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
 2371                Vector3[] corners = new Vector3[4];
 2372                firstBtn.GetWorldCorners(corners);
 2373                Vector3 center = (corners[0] + corners[2]) / 2f;
 2374                Debug.Log($"[DIAGNOSTIC] {visibleBtn.name}: worldCenter={center}, corners[0]={corners[0]}, corners[2]={c
 2375
 2376                var testGO = new GameObject("TestBehaviour");
 2377                _createdObjects.Add(testGO);
 2378                var test = testGO.AddComponent<TestScrollHelper>();
 2379
 2380                Debug.Log("[DIAGNOSTIC] === Testing ScrollTo with visible item ===");
 2381                var result = await test.TestScrollTo(
 2382                    new Search().Name("DiagScrollView"),
 2383                    new Search().Name("DiagVisibleItem"));
 2384
 2385                Debug.Log($"[DIAGNOSTIC] ScrollTo result: {(result != null ? result.name : "NULL")}");
 2386                Assert.IsNotNull(result, "Should find visible item");
 2387                Assert.AreEqual("DiagVisibleItem", result.name);
 2388            });
 2389        }
 2390
 2391        [UnityTest]
 2392        public IEnumerator ScrollTo_FindsVisibleItem_ReturnsImmediately()
 2393        {
 2394            return UniTask.ToCoroutine(async () =>
 2395            {
 2396                var scrollView = CreateScrollView("TestScrollView", new Vector2(0, 0), new Vector2(300, 200));
 2397                var scrollRect = scrollView.GetComponentInChildren<ScrollRect>();
 2398                var content = scrollRect.content;
 2399
 2400                // First item is visible, rest are below
 2401                CreateScrollButton("VisibleItem", "Visible", content.transform);
 2402                for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++)
 2403                {
 2404                    CreateScrollButton($"HiddenItem{i}", $"Hidden {i}", content.transform);
 2405                }
 2406
 2407                await UniTask.Yield();
 2408                Canvas.ForceUpdateCanvases();
 2409                scrollRect.verticalNormalizedPosition = 1f; // Start at top
 2410                await UniTask.Yield();
 2411
 2412                var testGO = new GameObject("TestBehaviour");
 2413                _createdObjects.Add(testGO);
 2414                var test = testGO.AddComponent<TestScrollHelper>();
 2415                var result = await test.TestScrollTo(
 2416                    new Search().Name("TestScrollView"),
 2417                    new Search().Name("VisibleItem"));
 2418                Assert.IsNotNull(result, "Should find visible item");
 2419                Assert.AreEqual("VisibleItem", result.name);
 2420            });
 2421        }
 2422
 2423        [UnityTest]
 2424        public IEnumerator ScrollTo_ScrollsToHiddenItem()
 2425        {
 2426            return UniTask.ToCoroutine(async () =>
 2427            {
 2428                var scrollView = CreateScrollView("TestScrollView", new Vector2(0, 0), new Vector2(300, 200));
 2429                var scrollRect = scrollView.GetComponentInChildren<ScrollRect>();
 2430                var content = scrollRect.content;
 2431
 2432                // Create many items so we have content taller than the viewport
 2433                // Use CreateScrollItem (not Button) so drag events bubble to ScrollRect
 2434                for (int i = 0; i < 15; i++)
 2435                {
 2436                    CreateScrollItem($"Item{i}", $"Item {i}", content.transform);
 2437                }
 2438                CreateScrollItem("TargetItem", "Target", content.transform);
 2439
 2440                await UniTask.Yield();
 2441                Canvas.ForceUpdateCanvases();
 2442                await UniTask.Yield();
 2443
 2444                // Ensure we're at the top
 2445                scrollRect.verticalNormalizedPosition = 1f;
 2446                await UniTask.Yield();
 2447                Canvas.ForceUpdateCanvases();
 2448
 2449                Debug.Log($"[TEST] Content height: {content.rect.height}, Viewport height: {scrollRect.viewport.rect.hei
 2450                Debug.Log($"[TEST] Initial scroll position: {scrollRect.verticalNormalizedPosition}");
 2451
 2452                var testGO = new GameObject("TestBehaviour");
 2453                _createdObjects.Add(testGO);
 2454                var test = testGO.AddComponent<TestScrollHelper>();
 2455                var result = await test.TestScrollTo(
 2456                    new Search().Name("TestScrollView"),
 2457                    new Search().Name("TargetItem"),
 2458                    maxScrollAttempts: 20);
 2459
 2460                Debug.Log($"[TEST] Final scroll position: {scrollRect.verticalNormalizedPosition}");
 2461
 2462                Assert.IsNotNull(result, "Should find target after scrolling");
 2463                Assert.AreEqual("TargetItem", result.name);
 2464                Assert.Less(scrollRect.verticalNormalizedPosition, 0.5f, "Should have scrolled down");
 2465            });
 2466        }
 2467
 2468        #endregion
 2469
 2470        #region InRegion Tests
 2471
 2472        [UnityTest]
 2473        public IEnumerator InRegion_TopLeft_FindsElement()
 2474        {
 2475            return UniTask.ToCoroutine(async () =>
 2476            {
 2477                var topLeftBtn = CreateButton("TopLeftBtn", "TL", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(-400, 250));
 2478                var bottomRightBtn = CreateButton("BottomRightBtn", "BR", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(400, -250));
 2479                var centerBtn = CreateButton("CenterBtn", "C", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(0, 0));
 2480                await UniTask.Yield();
 2481                Canvas.ForceUpdateCanvases();
 2482                var search = new Search().Type<Button>().InRegion(ScreenRegion.TopLeft);
 2483                Assert.IsTrue(search.Matches(topLeftBtn.gameObject), "TopLeft button should match TopLeft region");
 2484                Assert.IsFalse(search.Matches(bottomRightBtn.gameObject), "BottomRight button should not match TopLeft r
 2485                Assert.IsFalse(search.Matches(centerBtn.gameObject), "Center button should not match TopLeft region");
 2486            });
 2487        }
 2488
 2489        [UnityTest]
 2490        public IEnumerator InRegion_Center_FindsElement()
 2491        {
 2492            return UniTask.ToCoroutine(async () =>
 2493            {
 2494                var topLeftBtn = CreateButton("TopLeftBtn", "TL", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(-400, 250));
 2495                var bottomRightBtn = CreateButton("BottomRightBtn", "BR", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(400, -250));
 2496                var centerBtn = CreateButton("CenterBtn", "C", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(0, 0));
 2497                await UniTask.Yield();
 2498                Canvas.ForceUpdateCanvases();
 2499                var search = new Search().Type<Button>().InRegion(ScreenRegion.Center);
 2500                Assert.IsFalse(search.Matches(topLeftBtn.gameObject), "TopLeft button should not match Center region");
 2501                Assert.IsFalse(search.Matches(bottomRightBtn.gameObject), "BottomRight button should not match Center re
 2502                Assert.IsTrue(search.Matches(centerBtn.gameObject), "Center button should match Center region");
 2503            });
 2504        }
 2505
 2506        #endregion
 2507
 2508        #region Helper Methods
 2509
 2510        private GameObject CreateTestObject(string name, Transform parent = null)
 2511        {
 2512            var go = new GameObject(name);
 2513            go.transform.SetParent(parent ?? _canvas.transform, false);
 2514            _createdObjects.Add(go);
 2515            return go;
 2516        }
 2517
 2518        private GameObject CreateButtonWithText(string name, string text, Transform parent = null)
 2519        {
 2520            var go = CreateTestObject(name, parent);
 2521            go.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
 2522            go.AddComponent<Image>();
 2523            go.AddComponent<Button>();
 2524            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
 2525            textGO.transform.SetParent(go.transform);
 2526            var tmp = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
 2527            tmp.text = text;
 2528            _createdObjects.Add(textGO);
 2529            return go;
 2530        }
 2531
 2532        private Button CreateScrollButton(string name, string text, Transform parent)
 2533        {
 2534            // Button for use in ScrollView with VerticalLayoutGroup - no explicit positioning needed
 2535            var go = new GameObject(name);
 2536            go.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
 2537            _createdObjects.Add(go);
 2538            var rect = go.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
 2539            rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, 40); // Width controlled by layout, height is 40
 2540            var layoutElement = go.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
 2541            layoutElement.preferredHeight = 40;
 2542            layoutElement.flexibleWidth = 1;
 2543            go.AddComponent<Image>().color = new Color(0.3f, 0.3f, 0.3f);
 2544            var button = go.AddComponent<Button>();
 2545            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
 2546            textGO.transform.SetParent(go.transform, false);
 2547            _createdObjects.Add(textGO);
 2548            var textRect = textGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
 2549            textRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
 2550            textRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
 2551            textRect.sizeDelta = Vector2.zero;
 2552            var tmp = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
 2553            tmp.text = text;
 2554            tmp.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
 2555            return button;
 2556        }
 2557
 2558        /// <summary>
 2559        /// Creates a scroll item WITHOUT a Button component (just Image + Text).
 2560        /// This allows drag events to properly bubble to the ScrollRect.
 2561        /// </summary>
 2562        private GameObject CreateScrollItem(string name, string text, Transform parent)
 2563        {
 2564            var go = new GameObject(name);
 2565            go.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
 2566            _createdObjects.Add(go);
 2567            var rect = go.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
 2568            rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, 40);
 2569            var layoutElement = go.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
 2570            layoutElement.preferredHeight = 40;
 2571            layoutElement.flexibleWidth = 1;
 2572            var image = go.AddComponent<Image>();
 2573            image.color = new Color(0.25f, 0.25f, 0.25f);
 2574            // NO Button component - drag events will bubble to ScrollRect
 2575
 2576            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
 2577            textGO.transform.SetParent(go.transform, false);
 2578            _createdObjects.Add(textGO);
 2579            var textRect = textGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
 2580            textRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
 2581            textRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
 2582            textRect.sizeDelta = Vector2.zero;
 2583            var tmp = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
 2584            tmp.text = text;
 2585            tmp.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
 2586            return go;
 2587        }
 2588
 2589        private Button CreateButton(string name, string text, Transform parent, Vector2 position)
 2590        {
 2591            var go = new GameObject(name);
 2592            go.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
 2593            _createdObjects.Add(go);
 2594            var rect = go.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
 2595            rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(100, 40);
 2596            rect.anchoredPosition = position;
 2597            go.AddComponent<Image>();
 2598            var button = go.AddComponent<Button>();
 2599            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
 2600            textGO.transform.SetParent(go.transform, false);
 2601            _createdObjects.Add(textGO);
 2602            var textRect = textGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
 2603            textRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
 2604            textRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
 2605            textRect.sizeDelta = Vector2.zero;
 2606            var tmp = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
 2607            tmp.text = text;
 2608            tmp.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
 2609            return button;
 2610        }
 2611
 2612        private Slider CreateSlider(string name, float value, Transform parent, Vector2 position)
 2613        {
 2614            var go = new GameObject(name);
 2615            go.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
 2616            _createdObjects.Add(go);
 2617            var rect = go.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
 2618            rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(160, 20);
 2619            rect.anchoredPosition = position;
 2620            var slider = go.AddComponent<Slider>();
 2621            slider.minValue = 0f;
 2622            slider.maxValue = 1f;
 2623            slider.value = value;
 2624            return slider;
 2625        }
 2626
 2627        private GameObject CreatePanel(string name, Transform parent, Vector2 position, Vector2 size)
 2628        {
 2629            var go = new GameObject(name);
 2630            go.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
 2631            _createdObjects.Add(go);
 2632            var rect = go.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
 2633            rect.sizeDelta = size;
 2634            rect.anchoredPosition = position;
 2635            var image = go.AddComponent<Image>();
 2636            image.color = new Color(0.2f, 0.2f, 0.2f, 0.9f);
 2637            return go;
 2638        }
 2639
 2640        private GameObject CreateScrollView(string name, Vector2 position, Vector2 size)
 2641        {
 2642            // Match the working sample structure:
 2643            // - Mask on ScrollView (not viewport) with showMaskGraphic = true
 2644            // - No Image on Content (children have Images for raycast)
 2645            var go = new GameObject(name);
 2646            go.transform.SetParent(_canvas.transform, false);
 2647            _createdObjects.Add(go);
 2648            var rect = go.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
 2649            rect.sizeDelta = size;
 2650            rect.anchoredPosition = position;
 2651            var image = go.AddComponent<Image>();
 2652            image.color = new Color(0.15f, 0.15f, 0.15f);
 2653            go.AddComponent<Mask>().showMaskGraphic = true; // Mask on ScrollView, not viewport
 2654            var scrollRect = go.AddComponent<ScrollRect>();
 2655            scrollRect.horizontal = false;
 2656            scrollRect.vertical = true;
 2657            scrollRect.movementType = ScrollRect.MovementType.Clamped; // Prevent elastic bouncing
 2658            scrollRect.inertia = false; // Disable inertia for predictable test behavior
 2659
 2660            var viewport = new GameObject("Viewport");
 2661            viewport.transform.SetParent(go.transform, false);
 2662            var viewportRect = viewport.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
 2663            viewportRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
 2664            viewportRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
 2665            viewportRect.sizeDelta = Vector2.zero;
 2666            // No Mask on viewport - it's on the parent ScrollView
 2667            scrollRect.viewport = viewportRect;
 2668
 2669            var content = new GameObject("Content");
 2670            content.transform.SetParent(viewport.transform, false);
 2671            var contentRect = content.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
 2672            contentRect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
 2673            contentRect.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
 2674            contentRect.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);
 2675            contentRect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, size.y * 2);
 2676            // NO Image on content - child items provide raycast targets
 2677            // This ensures drag events bubble up to ScrollRect properly
 2678
 2679            // Add VerticalLayoutGroup for proper item placement
 2680            var layoutGroup = content.AddComponent<VerticalLayoutGroup>();
 2681            layoutGroup.childAlignment = TextAnchor.UpperCenter;
 2682            layoutGroup.childControlWidth = true;
 2683            layoutGroup.childControlHeight = false;
 2684            layoutGroup.childForceExpandWidth = true;
 2685            layoutGroup.childForceExpandHeight = false;
 2686            layoutGroup.spacing = 5;
 2687            layoutGroup.padding = new RectOffset(5, 5, 5, 5);
 2688            // Add ContentSizeFitter to auto-resize based on children
 2689            var sizeFitter = content.AddComponent<ContentSizeFitter>();
 2690            sizeFitter.verticalFit = ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
 2691            scrollRect.content = contentRect;
 2692            return go;
 2693        }
 2694
 2695        private GameObject CreateLabel(string text, Vector2 position)
 2696        {
 2697            var go = new GameObject($"Label_{text}");
 2698            go.transform.SetParent(_canvas.transform, false);
 2699            _createdObjects.Add(go);
 2700            var rect = go.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
 2701            rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(100, 30);
 2702            rect.anchoredPosition = position;
 2703            var tmp = go.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
 2704            tmp.text = text;
 2705            return go;
 2706        }
 2707
 2708        private GameObject CreateLabelInParent(string text, Transform parent, Vector2 position)
 2709        {
 2710            var go = new GameObject($"Label_{text}");
 2711            go.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
 2712            _createdObjects.Add(go);
 2713            var rect = go.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
 2714            rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(100, 30);
 2715            rect.anchoredPosition = position;
 2716            var tmp = go.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
 2717            tmp.text = text;
 2718            return go;
 2719        }
 2720
 2721        private GameObject CreateButton(string name, Vector2 position)
 2722        {
 2723            var go = new GameObject(name);
 2724            go.transform.SetParent(_canvas.transform, false);
 2725            _createdObjects.Add(go);
 2726            var rect = go.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
 2727            rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(100, 40);
 2728            rect.anchoredPosition = position;
 2729            go.AddComponent<Image>();
 2730            go.AddComponent<Button>();
 2731            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
 2732            textGO.transform.SetParent(go.transform, false);
 2733            _createdObjects.Add(textGO);
 2734            var tmp = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
 2735            tmp.text = name;
 2736            return go;
 2737        }
 2738
 2739        private GameObject CreateInputField(string name, Vector2 position)
 2740        {
 2741            var go = new GameObject(name);
 2742            go.transform.SetParent(_canvas.transform, false);
 2743            _createdObjects.Add(go);
 2744            var rect = go.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
 2745            rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(150, 30);
 2746            rect.anchoredPosition = position;
 2747            go.AddComponent<Image>();
 2748            var textArea = new GameObject("Text Area");
 2749            textArea.transform.SetParent(go.transform, false);
 2750            var textAreaRect = textArea.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
 2751            textAreaRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
 2752            textAreaRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
 2753            textAreaRect.sizeDelta = Vector2.zero;
 2754            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
 2755            textGO.transform.SetParent(textArea.transform, false);
 2756            var textRect = textGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
 2757            textRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
 2758            textRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
 2759            textRect.sizeDelta = Vector2.zero;
 2760            var inputText = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
 2761            var inputField = go.AddComponent<TMP_InputField>();
 2762            inputField.textViewport = textAreaRect;
 2763            inputField.textComponent = inputText;
 2764            return go;
 2765        }
 2766
 2767        #endregion
 2768
 2769        #region FindItems Tests
 2770
 2771        [UnityTest]
 2772        public IEnumerator FindItems_ScrollRect_ReturnsItemsInOrder()
 2773        {
 2774            return UniTask.ToCoroutine(async () =>
 2775            {
 2776                var scrollViewGO = CreateScrollView("InventoryList", Vector2.zero, new Vector2(300, 200));
 2777                var scrollRect = scrollViewGO.GetComponent<ScrollRect>();
 2778                var content = scrollRect.content;
 2779
 2780                CreateScrollItem("Item1", "First Item", content);
 2781                CreateScrollItem("Item2", "Second Item", content);
 2782                CreateScrollItem("Item3", "Third Item", content);
 2783                CreateScrollItem("Item4", "Fourth Item", content);
 2784
 2785                await UniTask.Yield();
 2786                Canvas.ForceUpdateCanvases();
 2787                LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(content);
 2788
 2789                var helper = CreateFindItemsHelper();
 2790                var container = await helper.TestFindItems("InventoryList");
 2791
 2792                Assert.NotNull(container);
 2793                Assert.NotNull(container.ScrollRect);
 2794                var items = container.Items.ToList();
 2795                Assert.AreEqual(4, items.Count, "Should find 4 items");
 2796                Assert.AreEqual("Item1", items[0].gameObject.name, "First item should be Item1");
 2797                Assert.AreEqual("Item4", items[3].gameObject.name, "Last item should be Item4");
 2798            });
 2799        }
 2800
 2801        [UnityTest]
 2802        public IEnumerator FindItems_WithFilter_ReturnsFilteredItems()
 2803        {
 2804            return UniTask.ToCoroutine(async () =>
 2805            {
 2806                var scrollViewGO = CreateScrollView("FilterList", Vector2.zero, new Vector2(300, 200));
 2807                var scrollRect = scrollViewGO.GetComponent<ScrollRect>();
 2808                var content = scrollRect.content;
 2809
 2810                CreateScrollItem("RareItem1", "Rare Sword", content);
 2811                CreateScrollItem("CommonItem1", "Common Shield", content);
 2812                CreateScrollItem("RareItem2", "Rare Bow", content);
 2813                CreateScrollItem("CommonItem2", "Common Helmet", content);
 2814
 2815                await UniTask.Yield();
 2816                Canvas.ForceUpdateCanvases();
 2817                LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(content);
 2818
 2819                var helper = CreateFindItemsHelper();
 2820                var container = await helper.TestFindItems("FilterList", new Search().Name("Rare*"));
 2821
 2822                var items = container.Items.ToList();
 2823                Assert.AreEqual(2, items.Count, "Should find 2 rare items");
 2824                Assert.IsTrue(items.All(i => i.gameObject.name.StartsWith("Rare")), "All items should start with Rare");
 2825            });
 2826        }
 2827
 2828        [UnityTest]
 2829        public IEnumerator FindItems_VerticalLayoutGroup_ReturnsItems()
 2830        {
 2831            return UniTask.ToCoroutine(async () =>
 2832            {
 2833                var layoutGO = new GameObject("TabBar");
 2834                layoutGO.transform.SetParent(_canvas.transform, false);
 2835                _createdObjects.Add(layoutGO);
 2836                var rect = layoutGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
 2837                rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(200, 300);
 2838                var vlg = layoutGO.AddComponent<VerticalLayoutGroup>();
 2839                vlg.childForceExpandWidth = true;
 2840                vlg.childForceExpandHeight = false;
 2841
 2842                CreateButton("Tab1", "Home", layoutGO.transform, Vector2.zero);
 2843                CreateButton("Tab2", "Settings", layoutGO.transform, Vector2.zero);
 2844                CreateButton("Tab3", "Profile", layoutGO.transform, Vector2.zero);
 2845
 2846                await UniTask.Yield();
 2847                Canvas.ForceUpdateCanvases();
 2848                LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(rect);
 2849
 2850                var helper = CreateFindItemsHelper();
 2851                var container = await helper.TestFindItems("TabBar");
 2852
 2853                var items = container.Items.ToList();
 2854                Assert.AreEqual(3, items.Count, "Should find 3 tabs");
 2855            });
 2856        }
 2857
 2858        [UnityTest]
 2859        public IEnumerator FindItems_GridLayoutGroup_ReturnsItems()
 2860        {
 2861            return UniTask.ToCoroutine(async () =>
 2862            {
 2863                var layoutGO = new GameObject("InventoryGrid");
 2864                layoutGO.transform.SetParent(_canvas.transform, false);
 2865                _createdObjects.Add(layoutGO);
 2866                var rect = layoutGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
 2867                rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(300, 300);
 2868                var glg = layoutGO.AddComponent<GridLayoutGroup>();
 2869                glg.cellSize = new Vector2(80, 80);
 2870                glg.spacing = new Vector2(10, 10);
 2871                glg.constraint = GridLayoutGroup.Constraint.FixedColumnCount;
 2872                glg.constraintCount = 3;
 2873
 2874                for (int i = 1; i <= 6; i++)
 2875                {
 2876                    var itemGO = new GameObject($"Slot{i}");
 2877                    itemGO.transform.SetParent(layoutGO.transform, false);
 2878                    _createdObjects.Add(itemGO);
 2879                    itemGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
 2880                    itemGO.AddComponent<Image>();
 2881                }
 2882
 2883                await UniTask.Yield();
 2884                Canvas.ForceUpdateCanvases();
 2885                LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(rect);
 2886
 2887                var helper = CreateFindItemsHelper();
 2888                var container = await helper.TestFindItems("InventoryGrid");
 2889
 2890                var items = container.Items.ToList();
 2891                Assert.AreEqual(6, items.Count, "Should find 6 slots");
 2892            });
 2893        }
 2894
 2895        [UnityTest]
 2896        public IEnumerator FindItems_CanIterateWithForeach()
 2897        {
 2898            return UniTask.ToCoroutine(async () =>
 2899            {
 2900                var scrollViewGO = CreateScrollView("TestList", Vector2.zero, new Vector2(300, 200));
 2901                var scrollRect = scrollViewGO.GetComponent<ScrollRect>();
 2902                var content = scrollRect.content;
 2903
 2904                CreateScrollItem("ListItem1", "Item 1", content);
 2905                CreateScrollItem("ListItem2", "Item 2", content);
 2906                CreateScrollItem("ListItem3", "Item 3", content);
 2907
 2908                await UniTask.Yield();
 2909                Canvas.ForceUpdateCanvases();
 2910                LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(content);
 2911
 2912                var helper = CreateFindItemsHelper();
 2913                var container = await helper.TestFindItems("TestList");
 2914
 2915                int count = 0;
 2916                foreach (var (scrollRectComponent, item) in container)
 2917                {
 2918                    Assert.NotNull(scrollRectComponent, "ScrollRect should not be null");
 2919                    Assert.NotNull(item, "Item should not be null");
 2920                    count++;
 2921                }
 2922                Assert.AreEqual(3, count, "Should iterate 3 times");
 2923            });
 2924        }
 2925
 2926        private TestFindItemsHelper CreateFindItemsHelper()
 2927        {
 2928            var helperGO = new GameObject("FindItemsHelper");
 2929            helperGO.transform.SetParent(_canvas.transform, false);
 2930            _createdObjects.Add(helperGO);
 2931            return helperGO.AddComponent<TestFindItemsHelper>();

 2936        #region Component Overload Tests
 2937
 2938        [UnityTest]
 2939        public IEnumerator Click_Component_ClicksAtComponentPosition()
 2940        {
 2941            return UniTask.ToCoroutine(async () =>
 2942            {
 2943                var button = CreateButton("TestBtn", "Click Me", _canvas.transform, Vector2.zero);
 2944                int clickCount = 0;
 2945                button.onClick.AddListener(() => clickCount++);
 2946
 2947                await UniTask.Yield();
 2948                Canvas.ForceUpdateCanvases();
 2949
 2950                var helper = CreateComponentHelper();
 2951                await helper.TestClickComponent(button);
 2952
 2953                Assert.AreEqual(1, clickCount, "Button should have been clicked once");
 2954            });
 2955        }
 2956
 2957        [UnityTest]
 2958        public IEnumerator Click_Component_WorksWithFindAllIteration()
 2959        {
 2960            return UniTask.ToCoroutine(async () =>
 2961            {
 2962                // Create multiple buttons
 2963                CreateButton("Btn1", "Button 1", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(-100, 0));
 2964                CreateButton("Btn2", "Button 2", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(0, 0));
 2965                CreateButton("Btn3", "Button 3", _canvas.transform, new Vector2(100, 0));
 2966
 2967                int totalClicks = 0;
 2968                foreach (var btn in Object.FindObjectsByType<Button>(FindObjectsSortMode.None))
 2969                {
 2970                    if (btn.name.StartsWith("Btn"))
 2971                        btn.onClick.AddListener(() => totalClicks++);
 2972                }
 2973
 2974                await UniTask.Yield();
 2975                Canvas.ForceUpdateCanvases();
 2976
 2977                var helper = CreateComponentHelper();
 2978                var buttons = await helper.TestFindAllButtons(new Search().Name("Btn*"));
 2979
 2980                foreach (var button in buttons)
 2981                {
 2982                    await helper.TestClickComponent(button);
 2983                }
 2984
 2985                Assert.AreEqual(3, totalClicks, "All 3 buttons should have been clicked");
 2986            });
 2987        }
 2988

 2990        {

 2993            _createdObjects.Add(helperGO);

 3074
 3075    /// <summary>
 3076    /// Debug component to log mouse/pointer state each frame.
 3077    /// Attach to scene to compare real vs synthetic drag input.
 3078    /// </summary>
 3079    public class DragInputDebugger : MonoBehaviour
 3080    {
 03081        private bool _logging = false;
 03082        private int _frameCount = 0;
 3083        private UnityEngine.InputSystem.Mouse _mouse;
 3084        private EventSystem _eventSystem;
 3085
 3086        public void StartLogging()
 03087        {
 03088            _logging = true;
 03089            _frameCount = 0;
 03090            _mouse = UnityEngine.InputSystem.Mouse.current;
 03091            _eventSystem = EventSystem.current;
 03092            Debug.Log("[DragDebug] === LOGGING STARTED ===");
 03093        }
 3094
 3095        public void StopLogging()
 03096        {
 03097            _logging = false;
 03098            Debug.Log("[DragDebug] === LOGGING STOPPED ===");
 03099        }
 3100
 3101        private void OnDestroy()
 03102        {
 3103            // Clean up references when destroyed
 03104            _logging = false;
 03105            _mouse = null;
 03106            _eventSystem = null;
 03107        }
 3108
 3109        private void Update()
 03110        {
 03111            if (!_logging || _mouse == null) return;
 3112
 3113            // Safety check for destroyed EventSystem
 03114            if (_eventSystem == null || !_eventSystem.gameObject.activeInHierarchy)
 03115            {
 03116                _logging = false;
 03117                return;
 3118            }
 3119
 03120            _frameCount++;
 3121
 03122            var pos = _mouse.position.ReadValue();
 03123            var delta = _mouse.delta.ReadValue();
 03124            var leftBtn = _mouse.leftButton.isPressed;
 03125            var wasPressed = _mouse.leftButton.wasPressedThisFrame;
 03126            var wasReleased = _mouse.leftButton.wasReleasedThisFrame;
 3127
 3128            // Get current pointer data from InputSystemUIInputModule
 03129            string pointerInfo = "N/A";
 03130            if (_eventSystem != null && _eventSystem.currentInputModule is UnityEngine.InputSystem.UI.InputSystemUIInput
 03131            {
 03132                var pointerData = new PointerEventData(_eventSystem) { position = pos };
 03133                var raycastResults = new List<RaycastResult>();
 03134                _eventSystem.RaycastAll(pointerData, raycastResults);
 03135                pointerInfo = raycastResults.Count > 0 ? raycastResults[0].gameObject.name : "none";
 03136            }
 3137
 3138            // Only log when there's activity
 03139            if (leftBtn || delta.sqrMagnitude > 0 || wasPressed || wasReleased)
 03140            {
 03141                Debug.Log($"[DragDebug] F{_frameCount}: pos=({pos.x:F1},{pos.y:F1}) delta=({delta.x:F2},{delta.y:F2}) bt
 03142            }
 03143        }
 3144    }
 3145}
